applied_optimizations.name: int4_w4a16 tuning infrastructure
applied_optimizations.description: Added int4_w4a16 dtype support to tuning scripts including uint8 packed tensor creation and proper N calculation for 4-bit packing

applied_optimizations.name: MoE kernel config files
applied_optimizations.description: Generated tuned Triton configs for Kimi K2.5 MoE kernel (E=384, N=128, int4_w4a16) covering batch sizes 1-16384. Achieved 1.54x geometric mean speedup with best results at large batch sizes (1.85x at 8192)

attempted_but_failed.name: Exhaustive config search
attempted_but_failed.reason: Timeout - searching 425+ configs per batch size takes too long

attempted_but_failed.name: Aggressive config search for 512/2048
attempted_but_failed.reason: Timeout - large search space with 1000+ configs
